summary: Iteration 60: Implant Plan Bug Fix Testing - 17/17 tests PASSED (100%). All P0 bug fixes verified: GET /api/procedures/{id}/implant-plan now returns empty plans for new procedures (was 404), ObjectId validation returns 400 for invalid IDs, non-existent procedures return 404, full CRUD flow for implant plans working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/procedures/{id}/implant-plan correctly returns empty plans for new procedures (was returning 404 before fix)
ObjectId validation properly returns 400 for invalid IDs like 'NONE' or 'abc123'
Non-existent procedures correctly return 404 with valid ObjectId format
POST /api/procedures creates procedures and returns id correctly
POST /api/procedures/{id}/implant-plan saves and retrieves implant plans correctly
Full flow (Create -> Read empty -> Save -> Read saved) works as expected
Multiple implants (up to 6) can be saved and retrieved
Duplicate positions are correctly rejected with 400
Empty implants list is correctly rejected with 400
More than 6 implants is correctly rejected with 400
Implant incharge can read and save implant plans for assigned procedures
seed_data_creation: Test procedures created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix verified: GET /api/procedures/{id}/implant-plan now returns empty plans for new procedures instead of 404. Key fixes: (1) Backend separates existence check from data retrieval to avoid falsy empty dict issue, (2) ObjectId validation added to both GET and POST implant-plan endpoints. All implant plan CRUD operations working correctly.

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: GET /api/procedures/{id}/implant-plan returned 404 for newly created procedures
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: MongoDB projection on non-existent fields returns {} which is falsy in Python, causing the existence check to fail
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Separated existence check (find_one with _id only) from data retrieval (find_one with implant_plans projection)
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: PASS - New procedures now return {implant_plans: [], number_of_implants: 0}
